items.title: Past Due Payment - Equipment Lease Account Switch
items.summary: MMP Capital payment of $5,177.54 for BTL Emface equipment is past due. Bank account was locked due to fraud flag. Olivia completed forms to switch accounts and is waiting for Jack to confirm how to send them.
items.actionNeeded: Ensure Olivia sends completed forms and voided check to Jack Miller to resolve past due payment.

items.title: Marteena Contract - Signature and W-8 BEN Required
items.summary: Updated employment contract for Marteena with compensation and promotion sections. Requires signed W-8 BEN form and contract to be added to HR folder. Work schedule is 10am-6pm EST with 2x monthly Saturday cover.
items.actionNeeded: Review updated Marteena contract and ensure Olivia obtains signed W-8 BEN form and contract for HR folder.
